title: Compliant omnichannel outreach spot asset
prompt: Create a square 1:1 premium spot icon for compliant omnichannel outreach in the TSI 2.0 visual system. Transparent or very light background. Abstract envelope, message path, consent/validation check, and channel nodes combined into one refined icon. TSI dark blue #001E41 primary linework, TSI bright blue #4396F6 accents, tiny green #66CC00 verification detail, minimal warm-neutral shadow. Crisp, elegant, modern, scalable, not cartoon, not emoji. No logos, no text, no fake data, no watermarks.
notes: Small support asset for component sections and icon-led modules.
package_asset_policy: full-resolution PNG omitted from compact package; use bundled WebP preview for visual reference and regenerate from prompt metadata for production use.
